data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for milestone-based billing but lacks concrete evidence or endpoints to support the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
